Class DefaultJarHandler

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.java.classpath.AbstractJarHandler
uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.java.classpath.DefaultJarHandler
All Implemented Interfaces:
JarHandler
public class DefaultJarHandler extends AbstractJarHandler
A fallback JAR handler that uses Implementation-Version manifest attributes or filename pattern matching to extract metadata.

Implementation detail: This handler acts as the "Last Resort" in the pretty-printer chain, ensuring every library has at least a basic representation.

Author:
anahata

  • Field Details

    • VERSION_PATTERN

      private static final Pattern VERSION_PATTERN
      Regex to capture version-like strings at the end of a JAR name. It captures everything from the first dash followed by a digit until the .jar extension.

  • Constructor Details

    • DefaultJarHandler

      public DefaultJarHandler()

  • Method Details

    • canHandle

      public boolean canHandle(File jarFile)
      Description copied from interface: JarHandler
      Checks if this handler is capable of extracting metadata from the given JAR file.
      Parameters:
      jarFile - The file to check.
      Returns:
      true if this handler should be used.

    • extractMetadata

      public JarMetadata extractMetadata(File jarFile)
      Description copied from interface: JarHandler
      Extracts semantic metadata (ID, version, vendor) from the JAR file.
      Parameters:
      jarFile - The file to inspect.
      Returns:
      The extracted metadata, or null if extraction failed.

    • getBaseName

      protected String getBaseName(File jarFile)
      Description copied from class: AbstractJarHandler
      Gets the base name of a JAR file without the extension.
      Overrides:
      getBaseName in class AbstractJarHandler
      Parameters:
      jarFile - The file.
      Returns:
      The base name string.
